about.page_title: Over ons — Pulser · Het team erachter
about.meta_desc: Pulser bouwt het AI-besturingssysteem voor moderne fitness. Opgericht door een GTM-gerichte salesveteraan en een specialist met 30 jaar ervaring in AI en kennismanagement.
about.fitness_software_is_broken_were_re: Fitnesssoftware is kapot. Wij bouwen het opnieuw.
about.pulser_is_the_operating_system_for: Pulser is the operating system for that problem. One platform for operators. One AI coach for leden. A unified data layer that lets the two finally speak.
about.discovery_calls_lois_and_paid_pilo: Kennismakingsgesprekken, LOI's en betaalde pilots voordat we functies opleveren. Pull, niet push.
about.peerreviewed_biomechanics_validati: Peer-reviewed biomechanicavalidatie, EHDS-compliance, Horizon Europe-afstemming. Langzamer, moeilijker, verdedigbaar.
about.the_gym_only_wins_if_the_member_wi: The sportschool only wins if the lid wins. Every feature has to prove both sides benefit.
about.were_not_hiring_yet_were_building_: We're not hiring yet — we're building and validating with the first operators, coaches and leden. If that sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you.
about.gtmfirst_founder_sells_before_buil: • GTM-gerichte oprichter: verkoopt voordat hij bouwt
about.9_years_at_epam_systems_llmbased_t: • 9 jaar bij EPAM Systems — LLM-gebaseerde tools
about.founded_zorka_lab_seka_ai_ontology: • Opgericht: Zorka Lab + SEKA AI (ontologie-gebaseerde AI)
ai_coach.page_title: AI Coach — Pulser · De verdedigbare slotgracht
ai_coach.meta_desc: Realtime bewegingsanalyse via smartphonecamera. Wearable-integratie. Preventieve gezondheidsmonitoring. EHDS-conform en peer-reviewed.
ai_coach.a_coach_that_sees_every_rep_and: Een coach die elke herhaling ziet. En elk waarschuwingssignaal.
ai_coach.from_rep_quality_to_retention_p: From rep quality to retentie prediction.
ai_coach.the_feature_your_competitors_ca: De functie die uw concurrenten niet achteraf kunnen inbouwen.
ai_coach.most_ai_fitness_apps_are_a_thin: Most "AI fitness" apps are a thin UI on top of someone else's API. The AI Coach inside Pulser.One is built on our own proprietary movement interpretation layer — pose estimation, biomechanical modelling, blessure-risk scoring, periodisation. It runs on-device wherever it can, in the cloud where it needs to scale.
ai_coach.that_means_three_things_privacy: Dat betekent drie dingen: privacy-first by design, een slotgracht die groeit bij elke sessie op het platform, en functies die een SaaS-CRM niet in een sprint kan nabouwen.
ai_coach.not_openai_not_a_thirdparty_api: Niet OpenAI. Geen third-party API. Beweging, risico en plangeneratie draaien op onze eigen stack.
ai_coach.pose_estimation_and_form_scorin: Pose-schatting en bewegingsscore draaien lokaal op uw telefoon. Lage latentie, hoge privacy.
ai_coach.injuryrisk_and_programming_mode: Blessurerisico- en programmeringsmodellen zijn gebaseerd op gepubliceerd biomechanica-onderzoek.
ai_coach.every_session_across_pulserone_: Elke sessie via Pulser.One, Pulser.Gym en Pulser.Coach verfijnt het model.
ai_coach.mediapipebased_pose_estimation_: MediaPipe-based pose estimation runs on the lid's smartphone. Frame-by-frame form feedback on squat, deadlift, bench — no special hardware required.
ai_coach.apple_watch_garmin_whoop_oura_f: Apple Watch, Garmin, Whoop, Oura leveren continue cardiovasculaire en herstelsignalen. De coach weet wanneer hij moet pushen en wanneer hij moet terughouden.
ai_coach.members_can_share_injuries_chro: Leden kunnen blessures, chronische aandoeningen en medicatie delen. Plannen worden afgestemd op de echte medische context — met volledige gebruikerscontrole en EHDS-compliance.
ai_coach.point_your_phone_the_coach_scor: Richt uw telefoon. De coach beoordeelt diepte, barpad, heupstuwkracht, knietracking. Haptische of audiocues vertellen u wat u moet corrigeren — voordat u meer gewicht laadt.
ai_coach.weekly_programming_that_adapts_: Weekprogrammering die zich aanpast aan wat er daadwerkelijk is gebeurd: gemiste sessies, slecht herstel, zware dagen. Geen statische PDF.
ai_coach.combined_signals_flag_elevated_: Combined signals flag elevated blessure risk, signs of overtraining, cardiovascular anomalies. Members are nudged — sportscholen get context.
ai_coach.for_gym_operators_a_daily_list_: For sportschool operators: a daily list of leden at churn risk, ranked — with the reason why and the suggested intervention.
ai_coach.cto_andrei_kuryan_publishes_at_: CTO Andrei Kuryan publishes at Springer (AI-Powered Innovation, 2025). We publish biomechanics validation studies so sportscholen can sell leden on clinically proven AI.
ai_coach.eu_health_data_space_regulation: EU Health Data Space-verordening (2025/327) gaat gefaseerd live vanaf 2026. Pulser is vanaf dag één EHDS-ready ontworpen — niet achteraf aangepast.
ai_coach.members_choose_what_to_share_wi: Leden kiezen wat ze delen, met wie, voor hoe lang. Dataportabiliteit en recht op verwijdering zijn ingebouwd in het product, niet erop geplakt.
ai_coach.published_validation_unlocks_ho: Gepubliceerde validatie ontsluit Horizon Europe- en EHDS-subsidies — niet-verwaterende financiering die alleen wetenschapsgedreven platforms kunnen verkrijgen.
ai_coach.the_ai_coach_ships_with_every_c: The AI Coach ships with every copy of Pulser.One (gratis forever on the base tier, deeper features on Pro and Enterprise) and streams straight into Pulser.Gym and Pulser.Coach. A DeepTech moat built on our own IP.
contact.page_title: Contact — Pulser · Boek een demo, vraag de dataroom aan
contact.meta_desc: Three ways to reach us: sportschool owners book a 20-minute demo, investors request the data room, leden tell us where they train.
contact.members_tell_us_where_you_train_:
Members

Tell us where you train — we'll reach out to your sportschool.
contact.direct_email_works_too_gopulserf: Direct e-mailen kan ook: go@pulser.fit
contact.thanks_message_received_well_rep: Bedankt — bericht ontvangen. We antwoorden binnen 24 uur.
contact.name: Naam
for_coaches.meta_desc: Pulser.Coach is the cockpit for personal trainers and coaches — clients, programming, facturering and live feedback on one platform, connected to every sportschool and lid on Pulser.
for_coaches.one_cockpit_for_everyone_you: Eén cockpit voor iedereen die u traint.
for_coaches.built_on_the_same_movement_e: Gebouwd op dezelfde bewegingsengine die uw cliënten al vertrouwen.
for_coaches.stop_stitching_tools_start_t: Stop met tools aan elkaar plakken. Begin met trainen.
for_coaches.programming_comms_payments_s: Programming, comms, betalingen, planning, video, client notes — none of them talk to each other.
for_coaches.chasing_clients_rebuilding_p: Cliënten achternazitten, plannen opnieuw opbouwen, spreadsheets bijwerken — tijd die nooit op een factuur terechtkomt.
for_coaches.you_prescribe_a_plan_the_cli: U schrijft een plan voor. De cliënt traint. U hebt geen idee wat er daadwerkelijk is gebeurd tot de volgende sessie.
for_coaches.every_client_every_plan_ever: Every client, every plan, every betaling status — one list, one tap. Across every sportschool they visit.
for_coaches.draganddrop_plan_builder_wit: Drag-and-drop planbuilder met uw sjablonen, oefenbibliotheek en periodisering — direct geleverd in hun Pulser.One-app.
for_coaches.when_a_client_trains_you_see: Wanneer een cliënt traint, ziet u echte sets, herhalingen, tempo en bewegingsscore — aangedreven door de eigen bewegingsengine in Pulser.One.
for_coaches.automated_nudges_video_revie: Automatische nudges, videobeoordeling en herstelpings, waarbij de AI aangeeft wie deze week echt uw aandacht nodig heeft.
for_coaches.onlineoffline_sessions_packs: Online-/offlinesessies, pakketten, abonnementen, annuleringen — facturen worden automatisch verzonden. Niet meer achter betalingen aanjagen.
for_coaches.connect_to_gyms_on_the_pulse: Connect to sportscholen on the Pulser network. Your leden can train at partner sportscholen; the sportscholen can offer you to their leden.
for_coaches.pulsercoach_plugs_directly_i: Pulser.Coach plugs directly into Pulser.One (the lid app) and Pulser.Gym (the sportschool OS). Whatever your client does in a session — at home, at the sportschool, on the road — flows into your cockpit in real time.
for_coaches.no_manual_logging_no_can_you: Geen handmatige registratie. Geen "kun je me een video sturen?" Niet meer blind vliegen tussen sessies.
for_coaches.pulsercoach_is_entering_earl: Pulser.Coach gaat de early access in. Meld u aan voor de wachtlijst en krijg prioritaire onboarding plus een plek in de coach-adviesraad.
for_gyms.page_title: Voor Sportscholen — Pulser · Verlaag verloop, vervang uw stack, voeg AI toe
for_gyms.meta_desc: The sportschool operating system that replaces Mindbody, Glofox, a lid app and your e-commerce — and adds an AI coach that cuts churn by 12pp.
for_gyms.software_your_members_actually_: Software your leden actually stay for.
for_gyms.youre_paying_200800month_for_so: You're paying €200–800/maandnth for software that can't talk to itself.
for_gyms.one_platform_everything_your_gy: One platform. Everything your sportschool runs on.
for_gyms.200_members_12pp_less_churn_172: 200 leden. 12pp less churn. €17–20K/year back in your pocket.
for_gyms.see_it_run_on_your_gym_in_20_mi: See it run on your sportschool in 20 minutes.
for_gyms.not_a_saas_with_an_ai_sticker_a: Geen SaaS met een AI-sticker. Een platform met een eigen bewegingsengine.
for_gyms.your_members_train_anywhere_you: Your leden train anywhere. You get new traffic in return.
for_gyms.booking_in_one_app_payments_in_: Booking in one app. Payments in another. Member app is white-labelled junk. Nothing shares data. No one sees the full lid.
for_gyms.your_software_schedules_classes: Uw software plant lessen — het vertelt u niet dat Anna al 11 dagen niet is geweest en over 7 dagen opzegt.
for_gyms.75_of_members_say_theyd_stay_if: 75% of leden say they'd stay if their sportschool offered personalised plans. You can't offer what your software can't do.
for_gyms.contact_attendance_payment_enga: Contact, attendance, betaling, engagement and health data — unified per lid.
for_gyms.group_1on1_and_pt_bookings_with: Group, 1-on-1 and PT boekingen with waitlists, coach rosters and auto-reminders.
for_gyms.subscriptions_dropins_packages_: Subscriptions, drop-ins, packages, failed-betaling recovery — EU-ready.
for_gyms.fully_whitelabel_ios_amp_androi: Fully white-label iOS & Android app — leden see your brand, not ours.
for_gyms.launch_a_branded_public_website: Lanceer een branded openbare website vanuit een sjabloon in minuten — geen webbureau, alles vooraf aangesloten.
for_gyms.builtin_storefront_for_membersh: Built-in storefront for ledenhips, drop-ins, supplements, merch. +€3–6K/year typical uplift at a 200-lid sportschool.
for_gyms.realtime_form_feedback_via_the_: Real-time form feedback via the lid's smartphone camera. Preventive health alerts from wearables.
for_gyms.pulsergym_ships_with_the_same_p: Pulser.Gym ships with the same proprietary movement interpretation layer that powers every lid on Pulser.One — lichaamsscan, form scoring, blessure-risk and personalised programming. Your sportschool becomes a place where science shows up in every session.
for_gyms.any_pulserone_member_can_check_: Any Pulser.One lid can check in at any partner sportschool within their tier grade — built into the platform, not a third-party network. Automated settlement, reciprocal revenue-share, no front-desk workarounds. Travelling leden stay loyal; travelling leden from other sportscholen become your walk-ins.
for_gyms.incumbents_manage_operations_pu: Gevestigde partijen managen operaties. Pulser managet resultaten.
for_gyms.mindbody_500m_revenue_3b_valuat: Mindbody: ~$500M revenue, ~$3B valuation, IPO planned. Still no AI coaching or retentie prediction.
for_gyms.a_tailored_walkthrough_of_the_p: A tailored walkthrough of the platform with real data from a sportschool your size. No slides, no sales pitch, no commitment.
for_members.page_title: For Members — Pulser.One · Your AI coach, any sportschool, one app
for_members.meta_desc: An AI coach in your pocket. Personalised plans, real-time form feedback, and preventive health — built into your sportschool's branded app.
for_members.your_ai_coachany_gym_one_app:
Your AI coach.
Any sportschool. One app.
for_members.the_coach_you_wish_you_could: De coach die u altijd al wilde. In uw zak.
for_members.three_steps_works_with_or_wi: Three steps. Works with or without your sportschool.
for_members.pulser_sees_your_movement_th: Pulser ziet uw beweging. En helpt u die te beheersen.
for_members.travelling_for_work_weekend_: Travelling for work? Weekend in a new city? Moved last month? Your Pulser.One ledenhip checks you in at any sportschool on the network within your tier grade — with your plan, your history and your coach right there with you.
for_members.one_slow_rotation_with_your_: One slow rotation with your phone camera. Proportions, posture, composition estimate — without a sportschool visit.
for_members.point_your_phone_at_yourself: Richt uw telefoon op uzelf. Frame-voor-frame feedback op squats, deadlifts, presses — aangedreven door onze bewegingsengine.
for_members.heart_rate_hrv_sleep_steps_f: Hartslag, HRV, slaap, stappen van Apple Health, Garmin, Whoop, Oura, Android Health Connect — verwerkt in uw plan.
for_members.overtraining_elevated_injury: Overtraining, elevated blessure risk, recovery debt — flagged before they become problems.
for_members.walk_into_any_partner_gym_in: Walk into any partner sportschool in the network within your tier grade — no day pass, no extra app. Your plan follows you.
for_members.book_a_human_coach_from_the_: Boek een menselijke coach via het Pulser.Coach-netwerk. Zij zien uw bewegingsdata. Uw sessies worden scherper.
for_members.free_forever_works_on_its_ow: Gratis forever. Works on its own, or as the lid app of any sportschool on the Pulser network.
for_members.body_scan_goals_wearable_syn: Bodyscan, doelen, wearable-sync, eventuele medische vlaggen. De AI Coach bouwt uw eerste plan in minuten.
for_members.home_homegym_travelgym_coach: Home, home-sportschool, travel-sportschool, coach's sportschool. Cross-sportschool access is built in. Your plan adapts to every session.
for_members.tell_us_where_you_train_well: Tell us where you train — we'll reach out to your sportschool. If your sportschool's not on Pulser yet, you can still use Pulser.One for gratis.
for_members.your_coach_if_you_want_one: Uw coach, als u dat wilt
home.page_title: Pulser.fit — Het DeepTech OS voor moderne fitness
home.meta_desc: Gyms, leden and coaches on one platform. Powered by our proprietary movement interpretation engine. Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One and Pulser.Coach — in sync.
home.whoever_you_show_up_as_pulser_syncs: In welke rol u ook komt, Pulser synchroniseert u.
home.one_app_any_gym_on_the_network: One app. Any sportschool on the network.
home.get_the_whole_ecosystem_in_sync: Breng het hele ecosysteem in sync.
home.a_free_ai_coach_in_your_pocket_body: A gratis AI coach in your pocket. Body scan, form feedback, personalised plans — and cross-sportschool access across the network.
home.stop_stitching_six_tools_clients_pr: Stop stitching six tools. Clients, programming, facturering and live movement data in one cockpit.
home.pulser_is_a_deeptech_company_everyt: Pulser is a DeepTech company. Everything on the platform is powered by our own movement interpretation engine — lichaamsscan, live form feedback, blessure-risk scoring, fatigue detection and personalised periodisation. Not an OpenAI call. Not a wrapper on someone else's model. Our IP, our data, our edge.
home.the_deeper_every_gym_member_and_coa: The deeper every sportschool, lid and coach uses the platform, the better the model gets. That is the flywheel generic fitness SaaS cannot build.
home.your_pulserone_membership_checks_yo: Your Pulser.One ledenhip checks you in at any partner sportschool of the same grade — home, travel or a spontaneous Saturday in a new city.
home.earn_reciprocal_traffic_and_revenue: Earn reciprocal traffic and revenue share on every visit from a Pulser.One lid, with automated settlement and zero front-desk overhead.
home.your_clients_keep_training_and_you_: Your clients keep training — and you keep seeing their real session data — even when they're not in your home sportschool.
home.crossgym_access_is_built_into_the_p: Cross-sportschool access is built into the Pulser.Gym and Pulser.One product from day one — not a third-party network bolted on top.
home.whether_you_run_a_gym_train_clients: Whether you run a sportschool, train clients or just want to train smarter yourself — Pulser plugs you into one platform, one engine, one network.
home.proprietary_movement_interpretation: Eigen bewegingsinterpretatielaag — onze kernstack, niet gelicenseerd.
home.runs_ondevice_where_it_can_fast_pri: Draait on-device waar het kan — snel, privé, geen cloudafhankelijkheid.
home.designed_for_the_2026_european_heal: Ontworpen voor de European Health Data Space-verordening van 2026.
home.injuryrisk_models_built_on_publishe: Blessurerisico-modellen gebaseerd op gepubliceerd onderzoek — geen onderbuikgevoel.
home.of_gymgoers_open_to_aipowered_coach: Of sportschool-goers open to AI-powered coaching
home.european_health_data_space_goes_liv: European Health Data Space gaat live
home.gen_z_picks_a_gym_based_on_the_memb: Gen Z picks a sportschool based on the lid app
investors.meta_desc: Een informatieve briefing over Pulser — het DeepTech-besturingssysteem voor moderne fitness. Markt, slotgracht, tractie en routekaart, op één plek.
investors.a_deeptech_operating_system_fo: A DeepTech operating system for a €8.4B sportschool software market.
investors.why_incumbents_cant_copy_this: Waarom gevestigde partijen dit niet kunnen kopiëren.
investors.from_poc_to_commercial_pilots_: Van PoC naar commerciële pilots in 12 maanden.
investors.we_are_not_running_a_public_fu: Wij voeren geen openbaar fondsenwervingsproces op deze site. Als u een investeerder bent die een gesprek wil, kunt u de oprichter direct bereiken via go@pulser.fit.
investors.eu_fitness_operators_digital_s: EU fitnessoperators digitale oplossingen (~15% van TAM)
investors.pose_estimation_biomechanical_: Pose estimation, biomechanical modelling, blessure-risk scoring and periodisation run on our own stack — not a wrapper on a third-party API. The movement interpretation layer is the product; everything else is distribution.
investors.mindbody_and_glofox_were_built: Mindbody and Glofox were built as planning tools. Adding DeepTech-grade movement AI requires a unified data layer they don't have. Rebuilding takes years and alienates existing customers.
investors.camera_wearables_usershared_he: Camera + wearables + user-shared health records feed a richer model with every session across Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One and Pulser.Coach. More data → better predictions → higher retentie.
investors.validation_studies_in_biomecha: Validatiestudies in biomechanicatijdschriften ontgrendelen Horizon Europe- en EHDS-subsidies — niet-verwaterende financiering die concurrenten niet kunnen verkrijgen.
investors.eu_health_data_regulation_2025: EU-gezondheidsdataverordening (2025/327) gaat live vanaf 2026. Compliance achteraf inbouwen in legacy-systemen is een meerjarig, miljoenenproject. Wij zijn vanaf dag één EHDS-ready gebouwd.
investors.every_pulserone_member_can_tra: Every Pulser.One lid can train at any partner sportschool in the same tier. Reciprocal traffic + automated settlement make the network more valuable with every sportschool that joins.
investors.warsaw_gym_owners_consistent_p: Warsaw sportschool owners. Consistent pain: fragmented tools, zero engagement data, rising churn.
investors.first_letters_of_intent_from_b: Eerste intentieverklaringen van boutique-studio's voor het pilotprogramma. Doel: 5 getekende LOI's voor Q2 2026.
investors.eic_accelerator_poland_prize_s: EIC Accelerator + Poland Prize ingediend. Oprichter won eerder LLB 02-242 EU-subsidie.
investors.architecture_amp_prototype_des: Architectuur & prototype-ontwerp gereed. MediaPipe-gebaseerde realtime bewegingsanalyse op smartphone.
investors.stage_trl_2_ai_architecture_an: Stage: TRL 2 — AI architecture and prototype concept defined. Target: TRL 4–5 (lab / sportschool-validated prototype) within 12 months.
investors.this_page_is_a_public_overview: Deze pagina is een openbaar overzicht. Diepere materialen — technische architectuur, financieel model, cap table, LOI's en subsidieaanvragen — worden één-op-één gedeeld onder NDA met investeerders waarmee we in actief gesprek zijn.
investors.61_of_gym_members_already_use_: • 61% of sportschool leden already use AI-driven fitness tools (ABC Fitness 2025)
investors.47_of_new_gym_joins_are_gen_z_: • 47% of new sportschool joins are Gen Z — digital-native, AI-expectant
platform.meta_desc: Het Pulser-platform: Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One en Pulser.Coach, allemaal aangedreven door onze eigen DeepTech-bewegingsinterpretatieengine.
platform.why_one_platform_beats_a_stack: Waarom één platform beter is dan een stack
platform.see_your_side_of_the_platform: Bekijk uw kant van het platform.
platform.member_crm_scheduling_billing_b: Member CRM, planning, facturering, branded app, e-commerce and the AI that keeps leden subscribed.
platform.body_scan_live_form_feedback_pe: Body scan, live form feedback, personalised plans, blessure-risk score and cross-sportschool access — with AI Coach built in.
platform.client_roster_programming_studi: Client roster, programming studio, live session data, facturering and a sportschool-network marketplace — one cockpit.
platform.pulser_is_a_deeptech_company_ou: Pulser is een DeepTech-bedrijf. Onze bewegingsinterpretatieengine is IP dat wij bezitten — gebouwd op peer-reviewed biomechanica-onderzoek en getraind op echte sessiedata van het platform. Het draait on-device waar mogelijk, in de cloud waar het moet schalen.
platform.every_tap_on_the_platform_feeds: Every tap on the platform feeds back into the engine. The lid gets better cues. The coach gets a clearer picture. The sportschool gets lower churn. The moat compounds.
platform.body_scan_posture_composition_l: Bodyscan, houding, compositie, live beweging. Eén telefoonercamera, één eigen model.
platform.rep_counting_tempo_rom_bar_path: Herhalingen tellen, tempo, ROM, barpad, risicomodellering — gebaseerd op gepubliceerd onderzoek.
platform.hrv_sleep_activity_apple_health: HRV, slaap, activiteit — Apple Health, Garmin, Whoop, Oura, Android Health Connect.
platform.built_into_pulserone_plans_aler: Ingebouwd in Pulser.One. Plannen, meldingen en nudges gegenereerd uit uw eigen data, niet uw feed.
platform.gym_member_and_coach_all_read_f: Gym, lid and coach all read from the same source. No CSV exports. No Zapier glue.
platform.every_gym_member_and_coach_on_p: Every sportschool, lid and coach on Pulser makes every other part more valuable. Cross-sportschool access is built in.
platform.proprietary_movement_engine_is_: Eigen bewegingsengine is ons kern-IP — geen model van een derde partij dat elke concurrent ook kan aanroepen.
platform.designed_for_the_european_healt: Ontworpen voor de European Health Data Space vanaf dag één — draagbaar, met toestemming, compliant.
pricing.page_title: Prijzen — Pulser · Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One en Pulser.Coach tarieven
pricing.meta_desc: Three products, clear tiers. Pulser.One is gratis for leden. Pulser.Gym starts gratis and unlocks the AI coach on Pro. Pulser.Coach priced per coach.
pricing.free_for_members_fair_for_gyms_a: Gratis for leden. Fair for sportscholen and coaches.
pricing.run_your_gym_on_one_platform: Run your sportschool on one platform.
pricing.one_cockpit_instead_of_six_tabs: Eén cockpit in plaats van zes tabbladen.
pricing.is_pulserone_really_free_for_mem: Is Pulser.One really gratis for leden forever?
pricing.can_i_import_my_existing_member_: Can I import my existing lid data?
pricing.do_members_or_coaches_need_speci: Do leden or coaches need special hardware?
pricing.how_does_the_crossgym_network_wo: How does the cross-sportschool network work commercially?
pricing.how_does_ehds_compliance_affect_: How does EHDS compliance affect me as a sportschool?
pricing.everything_a_member_needs_to_sta: Everything a lid needs to start training better. Gratis for every Pulser lid, full stop.
pricing.for_members_who_want_deeper_insi: For leden who want deeper insight and cross-sportschool access. Optional — the base app stays gratis.
pricing.replace_your_scheduling_tool_tod: Replace your planning tool today. Solo trainers and new studios.
pricing.full_management_platform_ai_coac: Full management platform, AI Coach signals and a fully branded lid app. For studios, clubs and chains of any type.
pricing.multilocation_chains_franchises_: Multi-location chains, franchises and premium clubs. The base fee covers the platform and your first location; each additional sportschool is €149/maand. Custom SLA, full API, co-branded portal.
pricing.for_independent_coaches_running_: Voor zelfstandige coaches met een eigen cliëntenbestand.
pricing.full_deeptech_cockpit_with_live_: Volledige DeepTech-cockpit met live bewegingsfeedback, biomechanische inzichten en AI-copilot.
pricing.for_coaching_collectives_pt_team: For coaching collectives, PT teams inside sportscholen and franchises. The base includes the team cockpit and your first 3 coach seats; each additional coach is €49/maand.
pricing.yes_the_base_tier_is_free_foreve: Yes. The base tier is gratis forever. Only Premium (€9.99/maand) adds cross-sportschool access, deep biomechanics reports and preventive health alerts — the core AI coach is gratis.
pricing.enterprise_gyms_pay_299mo_for_th: Enterprise sportscholen pay €299/maand for the platform (first location included) plus €149/maand per additional sportschool. Coach teams pay €149/maand (first 3 seats included) plus €49/maand per additional coach. You only pay for what you actually run.
pricing.yes_we_support_csv_import_and_bu: Yes. We support CSV import and build custom migration scripts for Mindbody, Glofox and Virtuasportschool during onboarding.
pricing.no_form_analysis_runs_on_any_mod: Nee. Bewegingsanalyse werkt op elke moderne smartphonecamera. Wearable-integratie is optioneel maar aanbevolen.
pricing.each_pulserone_plus_visit_to_a_p: Each Pulser.One Plus visit to a partner sportschool triggers automated settlement between sportscholen based on tier grade. No front-desk friction, no manual reconciliation.
pricing.ehds_becomes_mandatory_for_eu_he: EHDS wordt verplicht voor EU-platforms die gezondheidsdata verwerken vanaf 2026. Met Pulser bent u standaard compliant.
pricing.gym_pro_has_a_onetime_onboarding: Gym Pro heeft eenmalige onboardingkosten die worden gedekt door de besparingen van uw eerste maand. Enterprise omvat op maat gemaakte onboarding in het contract.
pricing.book_a_20minute_call_well_map_yo: Boek een gesprek van 20 minuten. Wij koppelen uw workflow aan de juiste combinatie van Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One en Pulser.Coach.
pricing.wearable_sync_apple_watch_garmin: ✓ Wearable-sync (Apple Watch, Garmin, Whoop, Oura)
pricing.crossgym_access_any_partner_gym_: ✓ Cross-sportschool access (any partner sportschool, same tier)
pricing.full_whitelabel_site_app_amp_the: ✓ Volledig white-label site, app & theming
pricing.access_any_partner_gym_in_the_ne: ✓ Access any partner sportschool in the network
pulser_coach.meta_desc: Pulser.Coach is de derde pijler van het Pulser-platform: een volledig besturingssysteem voor personal trainers, aangedreven door onze eigen DeepTech-bewegingsengine.
pulser_coach.every_client_every_plan_zer: Elke cliënt. Elk plan. /dev/null chaos.
pulser_coach.join_the_first_cohort_of_pu: Sluit u aan bij de eerste groep van Pulser.Coach.
pulser_coach.every_client_profile_with_t: Elk cliëntprofiel met trainingsgeschiedenis, doelen, beperkingen en live planstatus.
pulser_coach.draganddrop_plan_builder_wi: Drag-and-drop planbuilder met sjablonen, periodisering en een oefenbibliotheek — gesynchroniseerd met Pulser.One.
pulser_coach.the_deeptech_movement_engin: De DeepTech-bewegingsengine in Pulser.One beoordeelt beweging in realtime — u ziet het in uw cockpit.
pulser_coach.scheduled_nudges_video_repl: Geplande nudges, videoreacties, asynchrone spraakberichten. AI bepaalt de prioriteit van wie u deze week het meest nodig heeft.
pulser_coach.sessions_packs_subscription: Sessions, packs, subscriptions, cancellations, EU-ready betalingen. Invoices go out automatically.
pulser_coach.host_sessions_at_any_gym_on: Host sessions at any sportschool on the Pulser network. Get discovered by leden browsing for a coach.
pulser_coach.the_same_proprietary_moveme: Dezelfde eigen bewegingsinterpretatielaag die uw cliënten gebruiken in Pulser.One stroomt naar uw cockpit — bewegingsscore, tempo, ROM, vermoeidheidsmarkers. Dat is een DeepTech-slotgracht die geen generieke coach-app kan kopiëren.
pulser_coach.other_coach_tools_are_isola: Other coach tools are isolated. Pulser.Coach is part of a platform with sportscholen and leden already on it — so the people you need to reach are already here.
pulser_coach.designed_to_meet_the_2026_e: Ontworpen om te voldoen aan de European Health Data Space-regels van 2026 vanaf dag één. De data van uw cliënten blijft draagbaar, met toestemming en compliant.
pulser_coach.replaces_scheduling_payment: Replaces planning, betalingen, programming, video coaching, client CRM and analytics. Starts at coach-friendly pricing, not SaaS-bundle pricing.
pulser_coach.pulsercoach_is_in_guided_ea: Pulser.Coach is in begeleide early access. Meld u aan voor de eerste groep — prioritaire onboarding, gereduceerde tarieven, directe lijn naar het productteam.
pulser_gym.meta_desc: Pulser.Gym replaces Mindbody, Glofox, your lid app and your e-commerce platform with one unified sportschool OS — powered by a proprietary DeepTech movement engine.
pulser_gym.run_your_gym_on_one_platform: Run your sportschool on one platform.
pulser_gym.one_workflow_one_invoice_one_: Eén workflow. Eén factuur. Eén bron van waarheid.
pulser_gym.your_website_your_store_your_: Uw website, uw webwinkel, uw app — allemaal gegenereerd vanuit één admin.
pulser_gym.start_free_unlock_the_ai_coac: Start gratis. Unlock the AI coach when you're ready.
pulser_gym.a_proprietary_movement_engine: A proprietary movement engine, inside your sportschool OS.
pulser_gym.one_membership_any_gym_in_the: One ledenhip. Any sportschool in the network.
pulser_gym.profile_attendance_payments_e: Profile, attendance, betalingen, engagement, communication timeline — per lid, in one place.
pulser_gym.classes_pt_coach_rosters_wait: Lessen, PT, coachrosters, wachtlijsten, capaciteit, herinneringen — drag-and-drop kalender, mobile-first.
pulser_gym.subscriptions_dropins_package: Abonnementen, inloop, pakketten, aanmaningen, EU SEPA + kaarten. Geen third-party gateway lock-in.
pulser_gym.your_logo_your_colours_your_v: Uw logo, uw kleuren, uw stem. iOS en Android, App Store en Play Store.
pulser_gym.ship_a_fully_branded_public_w: Lanceer een volledig branded openbare website in minuten — kies een sjabloon, voeg uw content toe, ga live op uw eigen domein.
pulser_gym.sell_memberships_dropins_supp: Sell ledenhips, drop-ins, supplements, merch, digital products — one checkout, lid pricing, in-app purchase.
pulser_gym.members_in_the_pulserone_app_: Members in the Pulser.One app can train at any partner sportschool of the same grade while travelling — revenue-share and reciprocal access, built in.
pulser_gym.pulsergym_ships_with_the_same: Pulser.Gym ships with the same proprietary movement interpretation layer that powers the Pulser.One lid app — real-time lichaamsscan, form feedback, blessure-risk scoring and personalised programming. Not a wrapper on someone else's model. Our own IP.
pulser_gym.any_pulserone_member_can_chec: Any Pulser.One lid can check in at any partner sportschool within their tier grade — business trips, weekends away, moving cities. You get reciprocal traffic, automated settlement and zero front-desk friction.
pulser_gym.pulsergym_ships_with_a_whitel: Pulser.Gym ships with a white-label site builder. Pick a template, upload your logo, set your colours and domain — and Pulser publishes a branded public website and e-commerce store wired straight into your planning, ledenhips, betalingen and lid app. No web agency. No Stripe-and-Shopify glue. No separate CMS to maintain.
pulser_gym.curated_templates_for_boutiqu: Curated templates for boutique sportscholen, chains, yoga, combat sports, CrossFit, climbing walls, padel clubs, sports centres. Production-ready, SEO-clean, multilingual.
pulser_gym.class_schedules_membership_si: Class schedules, ledenhip sign-up, drop-in boeking, coach profiles, trial offers, contact forms, Apple/Google Pay, VAT, invoices, GDPR/EHDS. All live on day one.
pulser_gym.custom_domain_ssl_your_logo_y: Custom domain, SSL, your logo, your colours, your copy. The lid never sees the word "Pulser" unless you want them to.
pulser_gym.the_website_the_store_the_mem: The website, the store, the lid app and the back office are one system, not four. A lead who lands on your home page becomes a paying lid without ever leaving your brand, and the data lands cleanly in one CRM from the first click to the first check-in.
pulser_gym.launch_a_new_location_seasona: Lanceer een nieuwe locatie, seizoenspromotie of nicheaanbod in een dag, niet een kwartaal.
pulser_gym.pulsergyms_starter_tier_is_fr: Pulser.Gym's Starter tier is gratis — replace your planning tool today. Upgrade to Pro for the AI coach, branded app and cross-sportschool network.
pulser_gym.scheduling_amp_bookings_synce: • Scheduling & boekingen synced live with Pulser.Gym
pulser_gym.emailsms_via_your_pulser_inbo: • E-mail/SMS via uw Pulser-inbox + geautomatiseerde flows
pulser_gym.wearables_amp_health_connect_: • Wearables & Health Connect overdracht naar Pulser.One
pulser_gym.4_members_at_high_churn_risk_: 4 leden at high churn risk this week — scripted outreach ready to send
pulser_one.meta_desc: Pulser.One is the lid app of the Pulser platform — training, AI form feedback, cross-sportschool access and your built-in AI Coach, powered by our proprietary DeepTech movement engine.
pulser_one.your_gym_your_coach_your_body: Your sportschool. Your coach. Your body. One app.
pulser_one.everything_your_coach_would_c: Alles waarvoor uw coach zou rekenen — ingebouwd.
pulser_one.wherever_you_train_pulserone_: Waar u ook traint, Pulser.One traint met u mee.
pulser_one.travelling_moving_just_curiou: Travelling? Moving? Just curious? Every Pulser.One lid can check in at any sportschool on the Pulser network within their tier grade — no extra apps, no surprise day-passes. Your plan, your coach and your history come with you.
pulser_one.built_from_scratch_with_ai_in: Vanaf nul gebouwd met AI in de kern, niet achteraf toegevoegd als marketingslogan.
pulser_one.mediapipe_tracks_33_body_keyp: MediaPipe volgt 33 lichaamspunten op 30fps — geen cloud, geen vertraging. Echte gewrichtshoeken, bilaterale symmetrie, bewegingsscore per herhaling.
pulser_one.rotate_once_get_body_shape_fr: Eén keer draaien. Krijg lichaamstype, framegrootte, compositieschatting, houdingsvlaggen en een trainingsplan gebouwd voor uw daadwerkelijke verhoudingen.
pulser_one.ai_analyses_joint_biomechanic: AI analyses joint biomechanics, movement asymmetry and Health Connect data (HRV, sleep, resting HR) to predict blessure risk before it happens — a 0–100 score with zone breakdown and personalised prevention cues.
pulser_one.reads_fitbit_samsung_health_g: Reads Fitbit, Samsung Health, Garmin, Pixel Watch — all through one API. 500+ connected devices feed the blessure-risk model automatically.
pulser_one.your_workout_plan_updates_bas: Your workout plan updates based on your lichaamsscan, movement history and Health Connect data. No questionnaire guessing.
pulser_one.perexercise_form_trend_joint_: Bewegingstrend per oefening, gewrichtsnauwkeurigheid-historie, persoonlijke records. Zie duidelijk dat u daadwerkelijk vooruitgaat.
pulser_one.barbells_cables_machines_and_: Halterstangen, kabels, machines en cardio. Progressieve overbelasting bijgehouden per oefening. Camera-AI werkt vanaf uw geplaatste telefoon in elke hoek.
pulser_one.bodyweight_mastery_from_begin: Lichaamsgewichtbeheersing — van beginnerprogressies tot gevorderde vaardigheden. AI volgt gewrichtsuitlijning, spanning en tempo bij elke herhaling.
pulser_one.ai_tracks_depth_alignment_and: AI tracks depth, alignment and balance in real time. Pose-by-pose feedback, hold timers and a daily mobility programme built around your blessure risk score.
pulser_one.bodyweight_resistance_bands_d: Lichaamsgewicht, weerstandsbanden, dumbbells of geen materiaal. Volledige programma's gebouwd rond precies wat u hebt — niet wat u wenst te hebben.
pulser_one.park_bars_stairs_sprints_and_: Parkbars, trappen, sprints en buitencircuits. GPS- en cardiodata van Health Connect verrijken elke sessie.
pulser_one.fightcamp_conditioning_sports: Vechtsporten-conditioning, sportspecifieke kracht- en powertraining. Blessurerisico-engine afgestemd op hoge-impact belasting.
pulser_one.running_cycling_swimming_and_: Running, cycling, swimming and rowing — tracked via Health Connect. HRV + load monitoring feeds into your blessure risk score automatically.
pulser_one.returnfrominjury_progressions: Return-from-blessure progressions, physio-grade mobility protocols and load management. Injury-risk score drives every decision automatically.
pulser_one.the_free_tier_is_genuinely_us: The gratis tier is genuinely useful — not a crippled trial.
pulser_one.everything_you_need_to_get_st: Alles wat u nodig hebt om te beginnen. Geen proefperiode.
pulser_one.billed_monthly_cancel_anytime: Maandelijks gefactureerd. Op elk moment opzegbaar in 2 tikken.
pulser_one.prices_shown_in_local_currenc: Prijzen getoond in lokale valuta waar beschikbaar. Btw kan van toepassing zijn.
